description: Convergence backlog (2026-05-27, controlled green-run streak). Runtime docs items bl-003/bl-006 shipped via merged PRs #178/#181. Keep exactly one small, genuine-pending item here while proving consecutive meaningful cycles. Original 12-item roadmap remains parked in .agentforge/product-roadmap.json.
northStar: One unforked, runtime-agnostic AgentForge (Claude + Codex, best provider x model x effort per job) whose autonomous loop reliably ships, then builds AgentForge Cloud.

items.title: Add auto runtime resolver fallback-order tests
items.description: Tests-only; do NOT change production code. In packages/core/src/runtime/__tests__/provider-resolver.test.ts, add focused tests proving no-tools auto mode walks the available transports in this order: Anthropic SDK, then Claude Code compatibility, then Codex CLI, then OpenAI SDK. Include a case proving OpenAI SDK is selected only when the earlier transports are unavailable. Self-verify with `corepack pnpm exec vitest run packages/core/src/runtime/__tests__/provider-resolver.test.ts`.
